name: AdminNoticeBoard
texts: WhatNow UpdatesFrom the team · 10 entriesAnnouncement1 Jun 2026🚧 Site is Under Review — Not Publicly LaunchedWhatNow is currently in internal testing and review phase. Content, features, and design are being actively evaluated before public launch. If you're viewing this, you're part of the early access review.New Feature1 Jun 2026Admin Notice Board AddedThis panel is now live — the WhatNow team will use this to communicate site updates, new guides, feature rollouts, and important announcements directly to reviewers and early users.New Feature1 Jun 2026Live Exam Notice Board Added 🔔A real-time exam alert panel now fetches the latest results, registration deadlines, and exam news from national education feeds. Click the bell icon in the navbar to open it.New Feature1 Jun 2026Vibe Theme Switcher — 5 Colour PalettesUsers can now pick their colour vibe — Default Indigo, Lavender Breeze, Fresh Mint, Sweet Peach, or Soft Rose. The palette icon sits in the top-right of the navbar. Preference is saved across sessions.New Guide1 Jun 2026JEE Paper 3 (B.Planning) Full Guide LiveComplete guide for JEE B.Planning (Paper 3) is published — all 5 sub-pages including What It Is, Is It For You, Scholarships, Convince Your Parents, and Free Resources.View guideNew Guide1 Jun 2026IMU CET Full Guide PublishedThe IMU CET guide is live — covering Merchant Navy as a career, DG Shipping registration, cadet life, realistic salary expectations, and how to address parental concerns.View guideNew Guide1 Jun 2026NIFT, CLAT & UCEED Guides PublishedThree exam blueprints are now live — NIFT Entrance, CLAT (law), and UCEED (IIT design). Each guide covers all 5 sections: What It Is, Is It For You, Scholarships, Convince Your Parents, and Resources.View guideNew Guide1 Jun 20265 Career Guides PublishedDetailed career guides for Product & UX Design, Fashion Design, Corporate & Litigation Law, Merchant Navy Deck Officer, and Urban Planning are now available under the Careers section.View guideUpdate1 Jun 2026Hindi Language Support AddedFull Hindi translation is now available across the entire website — all guide content, navigation menus, hero text, and section labels. Switch from the language toggle in the bottom-right corner.Announcement1 Jun 2026WhatNow Website Build StartedDevelopment of WhatNow.in has officially started. The goal: a free, unbiased career and exam guide platform for Indian students after Class 10 & 12 — no paywalls, no coaching agenda.Official WhatNow team updatesJoin Discord

texts: ESCAllCareersExamsReadsHomeUnbiased guides, real stories, and clear roadmaps for Indian students.Open↵About WhatNowOur mission to provide free, honest, non-sponsored career guidance without coaching agendas.How to Convince Your ParentsArm yourself with placement stats, average salary data, and logical arguments for non-traditional careers.Scholarships DatabaseInstitute-wise fee waivers, MCM schemes, and state scholarships for professional degrees.UCEED — Design at an IITMain hub for the UCEED entrance exam for Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programs at IIT Bombay, Delhi, Guwahati, and more.UCEED — What It Is (Exam Breakdown)Detailed guide to UCEED syllabus, Part A & Part B structure, marking scheme, eligibility, and marking rules.UCEED — Scholarships & CostFind tuition waivers, Merit-cum-Means (MCM) scholarships, SC/ST/PwD exemptions, and total cost breakdown for design at IITs.UCEED — Is It For You?Honest self-check to see if design at an IIT aligns with your interests, skills, and daily work preferences.UCEED — Resources & Prep PlanBooks worth your money, free mock tests, previous question papers, and self-prep roadmaps without expensive coaching.UCEED — Convince Your ParentsSalary packages, placement figures, recruiters, and handling doubts regarding IIT B.Des vs B.Tech.NIFT — National Institute of Fashion TechnologyFashion design, fashion communication, and apparel production entrance guide.NIFT — What It Is (Exam Breakdown)Detailed guide to NIFT CAT & GAT paper patterns, marks weightage, eligibility, and the Situation Test.NIFT — Fees & ScholarshipsCourse fee details for B.Des and B.FTech at NIFT, and the Sarthak Financial Assistance scheme waivers.NIFT — Is It For You?Honest self-check to see if studying fashion design, technology, or merchandising at NIFT is the right fit.NIFT — Resources & Prep PlanCurated self-study guides, sample questions, and books to prep for CAT, GAT, and the Situation Test.NIFT — Convince Your ParentsEquipping students with retail industry placements statistics, career stability metrics, and talking points to align parents on fashion careers.CLAT — Common Law Admission TestEntrance for five-year integrated law degrees (BA LLB, BBA LLB) at India's National Law Universities.CLAT — Exam Pattern & Sectional WeightageDetailed guide to the Common Law Admission Test (CLAT) syllabus, questions distribution, marking scheme, and time management.CLAT — NLU Seat Matrix, Fees & ScholarshipsNLU-by-NLU seat allocation, reservation policies, domicile quotas, and historical opening/closing ranks.CLAT — Self-Study Plan & Mock StrategyPreparation strategy, best books, mock test resources, and planning strategy for self-study candidates.CLAT — Is It For You? & AILET ComparisonHonest self-check for suitability, NLU Delhi AILET comparison, and corporate desk vs litigation realities.CLAT — Convince Your ParentsEquipping students with corporate law firm placements statistics, career stability metrics, and talking points to align parents on legal careers.IMU CET — Indian Maritime University Common Entrance TestEntrance exam for B.Sc Nautical Science, B.Tech Marine Engineering, and Diploma in Nautical Science programs at IMU.IMU CET — Full Exam BreakdownSyllabus breakdown, Physics, Chemistry, Maths, English, and Aptitude distribution, registration, and counselling.IMU CET — DNS vs B.Sc vs B.Tech pathsDuration, fees, sea-time, sponsorships, placements, and earning potential compared across all three maritime paths.IMU CET — Preparation StrategySubject-wise preparation strategy, best books, mock test resources, previous year papers, and study roadmap.IMU CET — Medical Fitness & DG Shipping NormsComplete guide to the mandatory medical fitness test: vision rules (6/6 eye sight), colour blindness, and BMI.IMU CET — Convince Your ParentsAddressing merchant navy risk concerns, lonely life myths, high USD tax-free salaries, and cadet rotation structures.JEE Main Paper 3 — B.Planning EntranceExclusive national entrance for B.Plan courses at SPA Delhi, Bhopal, Vijayawada and top NITs.JEE Main Paper 3 — Exam Pattern & SyllabusDetailed syllabus breakdown of JEE B.Planning: Mathematics, general aptitude, and planning-specific questions.JEE Main Paper 3 — SPA Fees, Seats & ROIJoSAA seat matrix, reservation policies, tuition fees at School of Planning and Architecture campuses.JEE Main Paper 3 — Study Material & Prep GuidesSelf-prep blueprints, Part III planning guides, free mock resources, and official syllabus guidelines.JEE Main Paper 3 — B.Plan SuitabilityHonest check on whether urban planning is the right fit. B.Plan vs B.Arch vs Civil Engineering comparison.JEE Main Paper 3 — Convince Your ParentsEquipping students with real-world urban planning placement statistics, career stability metrics, and talking points to align parents on B.Plan decisions.Design — Creative Problem SolvingDesign user interfaces, digital products, apps, websites, branding, typography, and illustration.Fashion Design — Beyond the RunwayMerchandising, textiles, retail management, and apparel technology starting packages and pathways in India.Law — Advocacy, Corporate & LitigationHigh-paying corporate desks vs litigation grinding, National Law School ROI, and integrated LLB routes.Merchant Navy Officer (Marine Career)Salaries, sea time, cadet ships, tax-free income, and the true isolation on merchant vessels.Urban & Regional PlannerDesign public spaces, smart city transport layouts, sustainable developments, and municipal policies.Is an IIT brand name worth a drop year?An honest breakdown of the IIT tag value, return on investment of a gap year, and the mental tax no one warns you about before you drop.How to talk creative fields with engineering parents?A step-by-step communication playbook for students pitching design, film, or writing to parents who only understand engineering and medicine.Transitioning cities for work: Guide for juniorsReal, raw advice on finding PG hostels, budgeting for food, managing commutes, and surviving your first six months in a new Indian metro.↑↓ NavigateEnter SelectEsc Close

name: WhyWhatnow
texts: Why WhatNowBuilt like a senior,not like a brand.We made the thing we needed when we were 17 and confused. Three things make us different — and we're stubborn about all of them.01Actually freeNo paywall, no email gate, no upsell. Every guide stays free because the next student behind you deserves the same head start.02No coaching agendaWe don't sell courses or get kickbacks. We're not pushing IIT or IIM. Just honest reads on what each path actually demands.03Careers nobody coversUrban planner, animator, agronomist, naval architect. The careers your career counselor forgot — written by people doing them.
